notes: All prices are SGD/S$ (the schema field names say MYR, but the estimate is in Singapore Dollars per your request). I used live portal data from 99.co, SRX, StackProperty, PropertyVow, and EdgeProp. For HDB, URA caveat data is not directly presented as a standalone HDB caveat feed, so I relied on portal transaction pages that cite HDB/URA sources. Recent D22 comparables for ~90–95 sqm 4-room flats cluster around S$508k–S$566k, with some newer / better-located Jurong East examples up to about S$590k and a lower nearby Jurong West listing around S$525k. For a 1,001 sqft / 93 sqm 4-room flat, a realistic current market value is about S$530k, or roughly S$530 psf. Exact block, remaining lease, floor, facing, and renovation can move the value materially.
